reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the birth dates for George Kuchar and Arthur Penn.
2. Compare the two birth dates and return the person born first.
original_final_question: Who was born first, George Kuchar or Arthur Penn? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: George Kuchar was born on August 31, 1942, while Arthur Penn was born on September 27, 1922, so Arthur Hiller Penn was born first. -> Arthur Hiller Penn
